item.text:
Implemented state is already present under `visual/scenario/` and matches your requested controls/API.

- Algorithm dropdown population from finder discovery: [app.js](/home/sagar/PathFinding.js-fork/visual/scenario/app.js) and [controls.js](/home/sagar/PathFinding.js-fork/visual/scenario/controls.js)
- `Find Path` button callback wiring: [controls.js](/home/sagar/PathFinding.js-fork/visual/scenario/controls.js)
- `Clear` button callback wiring (and grid reset integration hook): [controls.js](/home/sagar/PathFinding.js-fork/visual/scenario/controls.js), [app.js](/home/sagar/PathFinding.js-fork/visual/scenario/app.js)
- Grid size selector (default `15x15`, common presets): [index.html](/home/sagar/PathFinding.js-fork/visual/scenario/index.html)
- Speed slider + parsed/clamped speed API: [controls.js](/home/sagar/PathFinding.js-fork/visual/scenario/controls.js)

Exported API is present via `createScenarioControls(...)` and includes:
- `getSelectedAlgorithm()`
- `getGridSize()`
- `getSpeed()`
- `onFindPath(callback)`
- `onClear(callback)`

Tests for controls logic and API are present and passing:
- [test/ScenarioControls.js](/home/sagar/PathFinding.js-fork/test/ScenarioControls.js)
- [test/scenario/ScenarioControlsApi.spec.js](/home/sagar/PathFinding.js-fork/test/scenario/ScenarioControlsApi.spec.js)

Verification run:
- `npx mocha --require should test/**/*.js`
- Result: `119 passing` (no failures).
